SEARCH
Module com.formcoach
Package com.formcoach

Class Navigator

java.lang.Object
com.formcoach.Navigator
public final class Navigator extends Object
One navigation primitive for the whole app. Each show... method swaps the stage's scene to a different page. Teammate-owned pages (landingpage, AuthPage, ExerciseSelectionPage) stay untouched — I wire their buttons from out here by walking the scene graph after the page is shown. AuthPage / ExerciseSelectionPage already expose callbacks via their constructors, so those wires go in through the constructor.

  • Constructor Details

    • Navigator

      public Navigator(javafx.stage.Stage stage)
      Constructs a Navigator bound to the given stage.
      Parameters:
      stage - the primary application stage all pages will be shown on

  • Method Details

    • showLanding

      public void showLanding()
      App entry point — opens the marketing / hero page.

    • showAuth

      public void showAuth()
      Login / register card. Successful auth -> selection. Back -> landing.

    • showSelection

      public void showSelection()
      Paginated exercise picker. After show(), wire up all of its buttons.

    • showProfile

      public void showProfile()
      Opens the user profile page.

    • showHistory

      public void showHistory()
      Opens the workout history page.

    • showChatbot

      public void showChatbot()
      AI coach chat popup.

    • showVideoPreview

      public void showVideoPreview(String exerciseName)
      Opens the tutorial video preview for the given exercise.
      Parameters:
      exerciseName - the display name of the exercise (e.g. "Push-ups")

    • showRunexercise

      public void showRunexercise(String exerciseName)
      Opens the live exercise session for the given exercise.
      Parameters:
      exerciseName - the display name of the exercise (e.g. "Push-ups")

    • showPosedetection

      public void showPosedetection()
      Standalone pose tool. Back -> landing.
